pi_items.verified_value: SPY (State Street SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust)
pi_items.source: Web search: Yahoo Finance, NASDAQ, CNBC confirmations of SPY as real ticker symbol for SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust
Web search: NinjaTrader official support documentation (ninjatrader.com/support/helpguides/nt8/) confirms Sim101 as default simulated account in NinjaTrader 8
Web search: NinjaTrader documentation shows default quantities cannot be changed, but scale quantity can be set in SuperDOM/Chart Trader properties via right-click > Properties > Scale quantity
Web search: NinjaTrader official support forum and documentation confirm standard workspace location at {USERPROFILE}\\Documents\\NinjaTrader 8\\workspaces

Code analysis: All NinjaTrader environment tasks follow this pattern. Verified against 10+ other task.json files in same environment, all use C:\\Users\\Docker\\Desktop\\NinjaTraderTasks\\ as output directory

pi_items.verified_value: Yahoo Finance Historical Data for SPY, AAPL, MSFT (2023-2024)
pi_items.source: env.json description and direct inspection: SPY.Last.txt contains real OHLCV data starting from 2023-01-03 (daily bars). 502 lines of data consistent with ~2 years of trading data

pi_items.verified_value: Control Center > New menu > Static SuperDOM or Dynamic SuperDOM
pi_items.source: Web search: NinjaTrader official help guide (ninjatrader.com/support/helpguides/nt8/new_menu.htm) and support article confirm SuperDOM accessible via Control Center New menu

pi_items.verified_value: Dynamic Order Matrix (alternative terminology used by some platforms)
pi_items.source: Web search: Multiple sources confirm SuperDOM is called 'price ladder' or 'matrix' on other platforms. NinjaTrader specifically offers 'Dynamic SuperDOM' variant

privileged_info_summary: The task configures a SuperDOM order entry window in NinjaTrader 8 (a real trading platform feature). The metadata correctly specifies SPY (the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust ticker) with real historical data from Yahoo Finance (2023-2024). The Sim101 account is NinjaTrader's standard simulated trading account. The workspace directory path C:\\Users\\Docker\\Documents\\NinjaTrader 8\\workspaces is the official NinjaTrader 8 workspace location. The target quantity of 50 refers to the scale quantity setting accessible via SuperDOM properties (right-click > Properties). The result path follows the standard pattern established across all tasks in this environment. No fabricated or incorrect metadata found.
